free_text: Resonance neutron capture in 60Ni below 450 KeV
from Bremsstrahlung of the electron beam hitting
.Neutrons were moderated in 4-cm thick slab of water
canned in beryllium placed immediately above and
Gamma rays were detected by NE230 C6D6-based
liquid scintillators canned in thin aluminum
containers 10.2 cm diameter and 7.6 cm height
Neutron flux was measured with the help of
capture events by means of gas-flow ionization
chamber containing one or more back-to-back 10B
deposits of 40 micro-g/cm2 thick, 8.4 cm diameter.
.Boron-10 layers total thickness is 2 x 40 mu-g/cm2,
